title: Both Trump and Iran share false information about 8 women facing execution by the regime

The reality - as confirmed by two NGOs - is that all parties shared incorrect information.

title: Deadliest year ever for Red Sea migrants with 922 deaths: UN
description:
ADDIS ABABA: The number of migrants who died on the “Eastern Route” from the Horn of Africa to the Arabian Peninsula doubled to a record high of 922 last year, the UN migration agency said Wednesday.
	Tens of thousands of migrants from Ethiopia, Somalia and neighboring countries take the route across the Red Sea each year, mostly from Djibouti to Yemen, in search of work as laborers or domestic workers in wealthy Gulf countries.

The co-main event features a middleweight clash as Milwaukee’s undefeated Jordan Newman (8-0) takes on American Top Team’s Josh Silveira (15-5).

title: Lebanese Journalist Killed in Israeli Strike Was Known for Being Intrepid
description: Mourners paid respects to Amal Khalil, who remained trapped under rubble for hours before emergency medics recovered her body.

title: Tanzania Report Blames ‘Outside Forces’ for Deadly Election Violence
description: The findings in a new report by a commission appointed by the government were at odds with details from human rights groups, which estimate that hundreds and possibly thousands of people were killed.

title: Touring Africa, Pope Leo Raised His Voice, but Didn’t Like the Echo
description: On his recent trip abroad, Leo XIV made some of his most forthright comments since becoming pope last year, but grew uncomfortable at how that criticism was interpreted.

title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump to Host Israeli and Lebanese Officials at White House
description: The preliminary peace talks, scheduled for later today, were moved to the White House from the State Department. The fighting in Lebanon between Israel and Hezbollah, mainly halted by a cease-fire, has threatened to undermine efforts to broker a larger peace deal in the Iran war.

title: Trump says he ordered US Navy to ‘shoot and kill’ boats mining the Strait of Hormuz
description:
US president claims Iran rudderless due to 'infighting,' as NYT report says IRGC in control and Khamenei 'gravely injured'; Katz: Israel awaiting 'green light' from US to attack nuclear sites, new supreme leader
The post Trump says he ordered US Navy to shoot and kill boats mining the Strait of Hormuz appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Israel is drawing closer to the Middle East — while the West turns a cold shoulder
description:
Israel is in the strange position of holding talks with bitter foes like Lebanon and Syria, while old friends in Europe are pushing to loosen ties
The post Israel is drawing closer to the Middle East — while the West turns a cold shoulder appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Unspecified threats temporarily close Houston synagogue and Jewish day school
description:
Jewish Federation of Greater Houston says it does not believe there was a risk to the broader Jewish community
The post Unspecified threats temporarily close Houston synagogue and Jewish day school appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Pentagon’s Record Breaking $1.5 Trillion Budget Request Includes Boosts for F-35, F-15EX, and More
description: The largest defence budget request in U.S. history, coming in at almost $500 billion more than 2026, would see accelerated procurement of key platforms and increased funding for headline projects like Golden Dome. The Department of Defenses budget request for the 2027 financial year was unveiled during a press conference at the Pentagon on Apr. []

title: Vessels report being hit by gunfire as Iran says Strait of Hormuz shut again
description: Merchant vessels attempting to cross the strait on Saturday received radio messages from Iran’s navy telling them they were not allowed to pass.

title: The rescue mission that brought 2 F-15E Strike Eagle crew members home
description: The operation marked the first publicly acknowledged U.S. ground presence inside Iran since 1980.

title: Trump says he has agreed to two-week ceasefire with Iran
description: Trump said he expects an agreement to be “finalized and consummated” during the two-week ceasefire.

title: Russia supplies Iran with cyber support, spy imagery to hone attacks, Ukraine says
description: Russian satellites have made detailed imagery surveys of military facilities to help Iran strike U.S. forces, according to a Ukrainian intel assessment.

title: B-2s flew 36-hour mission to target Iranian Revolutionary Guard meeting
description: B-2 bombers dropped bunker-buster bombs on an underground compound where commanders from Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps had gathered.

title: In first, Ukrainian unmanned vessel launches interceptor to knock out Shahed drone
description: Ukraine unleashed a powerful new defense against Shahed drones that could blunt Russia's ability to force concessions in future negotiations.

title: Truce without talks: What room for diplomacy between US and Iran?
description: How to mediate between Iran and the United States when one side wants revenge for the killing of its leader and the other’s erratic messaging seems ratings driven?Donald Trump’s unilateral ceasefire declaration bringing neither side back to the bargaining table, what with more ships seized in Strait of Hormuz and lockdown mode relaxed in Pakistan’s capital, this for talks that may or may not resume. We’ll ask about US demands that can change cour

title: Israel defense minister says awaiting US green light to 'return Iran to Stone Age'
description: Defence minister Israel Katz said on Thursday that Israel was "prepared to resume the war against Iran", adding that his country was awaiting a green light from the United States to return Iran to "the Stone Age". FRANCE 24's Noga Tarnopolsky reports from Jerusalem.

title: Iran flaunts its grip over the Strait of Hormuz with commandos storming cargo ship
description: Reporting from Tehran, FRANCE 24's correspondent Reza Sayah explains that "the arena has shifted from Iran, from the Gulf States, from Israel to the Persian Gulf, to the Strait of Hormuz" adding that "the greater strategy, the greater objective seems to be to create as much economic pain as possible for the other side".
